gamepad.title: Gamepad
gamepad.axisDisabledHint: Throttle axis disabled — use accelerate / decelerate buttons.
gamepad.learnAxisHint: Move the stick or dial that should control speed.
gamepad.learnButtonHint: Press a button on the gamepad.
gamepad.safetyWarning: Test your gamepad thoroughly and calibrate the settings first. A poorly calibrated or faulty gamepad can move the vehicle on its own! If the joystick is too sensitive or damaged, disable it and use the accelerate and decelerate buttons instead. Always map stop/brake to a separate button you can reach quickly in an emergency.
gamepad.detectHint: Move a stick or press a button on the controller to detect it.
gamepad.idleIntro: Leave the controller at rest (vehicle stopped) and learn the speed axis idle range. Small joystick movements are fine — we record the min and max resting position.
gamepad.idleWaitHint: Move the stick only within the resting range. Pressing a button aborts learning.
gamepad.idleAbortedMovement: Movement detected — hold the controller still and try again.
gamepad.idleAbortedInput: Button press detected — do not touch the controller during learning.

multiplier.title: Speed multiplier
multiplier.help: Scales this vehicle relative to the leading one (0.05–4.0).
multiplier.leadingFixed: The leading vehicle always runs at multiplier 1.0.

memberSettings.title: Consist member settings
memberSettings.leadingFixed: The leading vehicle is always included in consist speed control (multiplier 1.0).
memberSettings.leadingMultiplierFixed: The leading vehicle always runs at multiplier 1.0.
